across.clue: To belong means to be owned by or to be a member of something.
When something is digital, it is characterized by computer technology.
Leather is a material made from animal skin that is used to make clothing.
to spend a lot of time or effort doing something
A caretaker is a person who takes care of very young, old, or sick people.
relating to towns and cities or happening there.
A passport is an official document used for international travel.
To behave is to act in a particular way, especially to be good.
Clever means smart or quick to understand.

down.clue: Hockey is a sport played on ice with sticks and a puck.
A brave person is not afraid to face pain or danger.
Something that has an adverse effect can be harmful, dangerous, or unfavorable.
Alcohol is a type of drink that can make people drunk.
Least means smallest in amount or degree.
someone who is walking past a place especially when an accident or violent event happens.
To combine is to join together to make a single thing or group.
to leave a building or other place because it is not safe.
to move along the ground on your hands and knees or with your body close to the ground.
To inhale means to take air or a smell into the lungs.
A being is a living person or creature.
